summary: Phase 17.5: Ven-Us Capacity / Workforce Health Panel - All tests passed. Backend API (12/12 tests passed) and Frontend UI fully functional. Admin-only access controls working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Capacity API returns comprehensive rm_loads array with per-RM data (name, active_cases, capacity_pct, overdue_followups)
Alerts structure includes severity, category, title, message, recommendation - all properly formatted
Admin-only access control working: 403 for RM users, 403 for customers, 401 for unauthenticated
Frontend dashboard has all required data-testid attributes for testing
RM Load Distribution shows color-coded bars (green <70%, amber 70-90%, red >90%)
Advisory disclaimer visible at bottom of dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 17.5 Workforce Health Panel complete. Capacity dashboard at /team/admin/capacity is admin-only. API at /api/platform-ops/capacity/analysis returns rm_loads array with per-RM metrics and alerts with severity/category/recommendation. All data-testid attributes in place for UI testing.

features_verified.GET /api/platform-ops/capacity/analysis: PASS - Returns rm_loads, alerts, alert_count, analyzed_at
features_verified.Frontend: /team/admin/capacity renders: PASS - Capacity dashboard loads for admin
features_verified.Frontend: Summary cards: PASS - Today's enquiries, Avg RM Load, Overloaded RMs, Overdue Follow-ups
features_verified.Frontend: RM Load Distribution: PASS - Color-coded bars per RM with capacity percentages
features_verified.Frontend: Operational Backlogs: PASS - Stale cases, venue approvals, settlements, follow-ups
features_verified.Frontend: Alert Summary: PASS - Critical/warning counts, total RMs, last analyzed time
features_verified.Frontend: Ven-Us Recommendations: PASS - Structured alerts with severity badges and recommendations
features_verified.Frontend: Workforce Health link in Admin: PASS - Link navigates to capacity dashboard
